description: Traditional Vedic remedies (upayas) for strengthening or pacifying planets. Used when planets are weak, afflicted, or causing challenges in life.

general_principles.when_to_strengthen: Weak planet that is a benefic, well-placed but lacking strength, or significator of important life area
general_principles.when_to_pacify: Malefic planet causing trouble, debilitated planet, planet in 6/8/12 houses afflicted
general_principles.important_caution: Gemstones should only be worn after proper astrological consultation - wrong gemstone can cause harm. Mantras and donations are universally safe.
general_principles.principle: Karma (action) is the highest remedy. Spiritual practice, ethical behavior, and service multiply all other remedies.

sun.deity: Lord Surya, Lord Ram, Lord Vishnu
sun.mantra: Om Hraam Hreem Hroum Sah Suryaya Namah
sun.gayatri: Om Bhaskaraya Vidmahe Mahadyutikaraya Dhimahi Tanno Aditya Prachodayat
sun.gemstone: Ruby (Manik) - 3-5 carats in gold, worn on ring finger of right hand
sun.donations: Wheat, jaggery, copper, red cloth, ruby - give to elderly father figures or temples on Sunday
sun.fasting: Sunday fast, eating only once before sunset
sun.spiritual_practice: Surya Namaskar daily, sun gazing at sunrise/sunset

moon.deity: Goddess Parvati, Lord Shiva, Goddess Annapurna
moon.mantra: Om Shraam Shreem Shraum Sah Chandraya Namah
moon.gayatri: Om Padmadhwajaya Vidmahe Hemarupaya Dhimahi Tanno Soma Prachodayat
moon.gemstone: Pearl (Moti) - 3-7 carats in silver, worn on little finger of right hand
moon.donations: Rice, milk, white sugar, white cloth, silver - give to mother figures and women on Monday

mars.deity: Lord Hanuman, Lord Kartikeya, Lord Subramanya
mars.mantra: Om Kraam Kreem Kroum Sah Bhaumaya Namah
mars.gayatri: Om Veeradhwajaya Vidmahe Vighnahastaya Dhimahi Tanno Bhauma Prachodayat
mars.gemstone: Red Coral (Moonga) - 5-10 carats in copper or silver, worn on ring finger
mars.donations: Red lentils (masoor), red cloth, copper, jaggery, weapons (symbolic) - give on Tuesday
mars.spiritual_practice: Daily Hanuman Chalisa, visit Hanuman temple on Tuesdays

mercury.mantra: Om Braam Breem Broum Sah Budhaya Namah
mercury.gayatri: Om Gajadhwajaya Vidmahe Sukhahastaya Dhimahi Tanno Budha Prachodayat
mercury.gemstone: Emerald (Panna) - 3-7 carats in gold, worn on little finger
mercury.donations: Green moong dal, green cloth, books, stationery, emerald - give to young people and students on Wednesday

jupiter.deity: Lord Brihaspati, Lord Vishnu, Sri Sai Baba
jupiter.mantra: Om Graam Greem Groum Sah Gurave Namah
jupiter.gayatri: Om Vrishabhadhwajaya Vidmahe Krunihastaya Dhimahi Tanno Guru Prachodayat
jupiter.gemstone: Yellow Sapphire (Pukhraj) - 5-7 carats in gold, worn on index finger
jupiter.donations: Yellow lentils (chana dal), turmeric, yellow cloth, gold, religious books - give to teachers, priests, and elders on Thursday
jupiter.fasting: Thursday fast, especially for women seeking marriage
jupiter.spiritual_practice: Recite Vishnu Sahasranama, Guru worship, dharmic giving

venus.deity: Goddess Lakshmi, Goddess Saraswati, Goddess Durga
venus.mantra: Om Draam Dreem Droum Sah Shukraya Namah
venus.gayatri: Om Ashwadhwajaya Vidmahe Dhanurhastaya Dhimahi Tanno Shukra Prachodayat
venus.gemstone: Diamond (Heera) - white sapphire as substitute, worn on middle finger
venus.donations: White flowers, perfumes, white cloth, silver, rice, sugar - give to women and young girls on Friday
venus.fasting: Friday fast - especially Santoshi Maa fast
venus.spiritual_practice: Sri Suktam, Lakshmi worship on Friday evenings

saturn.deity: Lord Shiva, Lord Hanuman, Shani Dev
saturn.mantra: Om Praam Preem Proum Sah Shanaye Namah
saturn.gayatri: Om Kakadhwajaya Vidmahe Khadgahastaya Dhimahi Tanno Manda Prachodayat
saturn.gemstone: Blue Sapphire (Neelam) - 5-7 carats in silver or platinum, worn on middle finger - WEAR WITH CAUTION, test first
saturn.donations: Black sesame seeds (til), black cloth, iron, mustard oil, shoes, umbrella - give to elderly, laborers, disabled, and poor on Saturday
saturn.spiritual_practice: Hanuman Chalisa, Shani Stotra, Mahamrityunjaya mantra during Sade Sati

rahu.mantra: Om Bhraam Bhreem Bhroum Sah Rahave Namah
rahu.gayatri: Om Naakadhwajaya Vidmahe Padmahastaya Dhimahi Tanno Rahu Prachodayat
rahu.gemstone: Hessonite Garnet (Gomed) - 5-7 carats in silver, worn on middle finger
rahu.donations: Sesame seeds, blankets, mustard oil, copper, brown cloth - give to lepers and outcasts on Saturday
rahu.spiritual_practice: Durga worship, Bhairava worship, Saraswati for studies

ketu.deity: Lord Ganesha, Lord Bhairava, Lord Hanuman
ketu.mantra: Om Sraam Sreem Sroum Sah Ketave Namah
ketu.gayatri: Om Ashwadhwajaya Vidmahe Shoolahastaya Dhimahi Tanno Ketu Prachodayat
ketu.gemstone: Cat's Eye (Lehsunia) - 5-7 carats in silver, worn on middle finger
ketu.donations: Multi-colored cloth, blankets, sesame seeds, weapons (symbolic) - give to ascetics and orphans
ketu.spiritual_practice: Ganesha worship for obstacles, Bhairava for protection

kalsarpa_dosha.puja: Kalsarpa shanti at Trimbakeshwar or Kalahasti
kalsarpa_dosha.remedy: Worship Nag Devata, donate to snake charmers, recite Maha Mrityunjaya

remedies: Donate black sesame, mustard oil, iron on Saturdays
Avoid alcohol, non-vegetarian food on Saturdays

pitru_dosha.definition: Ancestral karma indicated by Sun-Rahu, Sun-Ketu, or Sun in 8th/12th

human_advice_tone.presenting_remedies: Present remedies as spiritual support and karmic balancing, not magic cures. Emphasize sincere intent over mechanical practice.
human_advice_tone.important_disclaimer: Always say: 'These are traditional supportive practices. The most important remedy is sincere action, ethical living, and inner work. Gemstones especially should only be worn after consultation with a qualified astrologer.'
human_advice_tone.psychological_framing: Remedies work partly through psychological commitment - the discipline of doing them creates positive change beyond the mystical aspect.
